summary: NYC Avenue NYC Community Development Block Grant funding data for FY17-FY19 by organization, including borough, council district, postcode, BBL, census tract, latitude, and funding source.

NYC city-funded social service contracts data including contract ID, number, start and end dates, provider ID, program ID, agency name, fiscal year, amount, and purpose.

Brooklyn Borough President Heroes of the Month honorees displaying bravery, listing name, affiliation, and month of recognition.
2016 NYC DOE school allocation memorandum (SAM) data for FY2016, including SAM number, link, subcategory, and total allocation amounts.
2017 NYC DOE diversity report on diversity efforts, including activity description, category, target population, and grade band for each initiative.
NYC Department of Parks and Recreation parking lot directory with location, GIS property number, department, council district, community board, precinct, and zip code.

2015-16 NYC school admissions methods listing school name, DBN, and admissions methods used at each school.
List of MBPO-sponsored legislation including name, subject, status, and URL for each piece of legislation.
